name: Raspberry Meringues
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225°F. Cover a baking sheet with aluminum foil. In a small bowl, using an electric hand mixer, beat the egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar, beating until very stiff peaks form (about 10 minutes). Add the raspberry preserves and food coloring and continue to beat for one minute at the highest speed of the mixer.
2. Drop teaspoonfuls, about two inches apart, onto the foil-lined baking sheet. Bake for two hours. Cool completely before peeling off the foil.
